Allelic frequency per Population size

Justine Floret

2026-01-15

library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(data.table)
library(gtable)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggrepel)
library(knitr)
library(stringr) #remove space in string
# Stat. libray
library(lmerTest) #glht
library(lsmeans) #pairwise comparison
library(emmeans)
library(glmmTMB) # negative binomial model

I. Preparing the data

Allelic frequency data

Median_AF_50kb_noContamination <- read_csv("/home/justine/sciebo/Genomic/assays/F5_pools_medianAF_50kb_noContamination.csv")

Median_AF_50kb_noContamination$Chrm <- as.factor(Median_AF_50kb_noContamination$Chrm)
Median_AF_50kb_noContamination$Pos_mean <- as.numeric(Median_AF_50kb_noContamination$Pos_mean)
Median_AF_50kb_noContamination$Sample_ID <- as.factor(Median_AF_50kb_noContamination$Sample_ID)
Median_AF_50kb_noContamination$median_AF <- as.numeric(Median_AF_50kb_noContamination$median_AF)
Median_AF_50kb_noContamination$SNP_tot <- as.numeric(Median_AF_50kb_noContamination$SNP_tot)

summary(Median_AF_50kb_noContamination)
##    Chrm          Pos_mean          Sample_ID        median_AF

##               Max.   :30413835   34     :  2205   Max.   :1.0000

##  1st Qu.: 29.00  
##  Median : 54.00

##  3rd Qu.: 99.00  
##  Max.   :499.00

Environmental data

Env_indexes <- read_csv("/home/justine/sciebo/2_Ecological_parameters/2_assays/Ecological_parameters_Environmental_Indexes.csv")

Env_indexes$Site_ID <- as.factor(Env_indexes$Site_ID)
Env_indexes$Type <- as.factor(Env_indexes$Type)
Env_indexes$April_23 <- as.numeric(Env_indexes$April_23)
Env_indexes$April_22 <- as.numeric(Env_indexes$April_22)
Env_indexes$EndMarch_24 <- as.numeric(Env_indexes$EndMarch_24)

summary(Env_indexes)

Merged the data set

median_AF_popsize <- left_join(Median_AF_50kb_noContamination, Env_indexes[,c(1,16,19,21)], join_by("Sample_ID"== "Site_ID"))
median_AF_popsize <- median_AF_popsize %>% filter(SNP_tot> 10)

Remove the sample with NA (population 49 was not accessible in 2023)

median_AF_popsize %>% filter(is.na(April_23)) %>% distinct(Sample_ID)
median_AF_popsize <- median_AF_popsize %>% filter(Sample_ID != 49)
median_AF_popsize <- median_AF_popsize %>% filter(Sample_ID != 34)
summary(median_AF_popsize)
##    Chrm          Pos_mean          Sample_ID        median_AF     
##  Chr1:33132   Min.   :   25000   1      :  1971   Min.   :0.0000  
##  Chr2:20723   1st Qu.: 6125000   7      :  1971   1st Qu.:0.3598  
##  Chr3:24815   Median :11775000   8      :  1971   Median :0.5173  
##  Chr4:20922   Mean   :12535458   24     :  1971   Mean   :0.5259  
##  Chr5:30492   3rd Qu.:18425000   27     :  1971   3rd Qu.:0.6841  
##               Max.   :30375000   35     :  1971   Max.   :1.0000  
##                                  (Other):118258                   
##     SNP_tot          April_22        April_23      EndMarch_24    
##  Min.   : 11.00   Min.   : 0.00   Min.   :  0.0   Min.   :  0.00  
##  1st Qu.: 37.00   1st Qu.: 0.00   1st Qu.: 10.0   1st Qu.:  7.00  
##  Median : 63.00   Median : 0.00   Median : 25.0   Median : 24.00  
##  Mean   : 80.24   Mean   : 7.53   Mean   : 45.2   Mean   : 58.64  
##  3rd Qu.:107.00   3rd Qu.: 7.00   3rd Qu.: 58.0   3rd Qu.: 76.00  
##  Max.   :499.00   Max.   :70.00   Max.   :234.0   Max.   :402.00  
##

Number of populations with at least one individual in April 2023

median_AF_popsize %>%
  distinct(Sample_ID, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x=April_23)) + geom_histogram() + theme_minimal() 

median_AF_popsize %>%
  distinct(Sample_ID, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x=April_22)) + geom_histogram() + theme_minimal()

median_AF_popsize %>%
  distinct(Sample_ID, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x=EndMarch_24)) + geom_histogram() + theme_minimal()

II. Median AF ~ Population size

Spearman correlation

chrm_list <- c("Chr1", "Chr2", "Chr3", "Chr4", "Chr5")
Popsize_model <- tibble("Chrm" = "1", "Pos" = 1, pvalue_22 = 1, R_22 = 1, pvalue_23 = 1, R_23 = 1, pvalue_24 = 1, R_24 = 1)

Run the model

for (chr in chrm_list) {
  data_chr <- median_AF_popsize %>% filter(Chrm == chr)
  positions <- unique(data_chr$Pos_mean)
  for (pos in positions) {
    data <- data_chr %>% filter(Pos_mean == pos)
    if (nrow(data) == 0) next
    corresults_22 <- cor.test(data$median_AF, data$April_22,  method = "spearman")
    corresults_23 <- cor.test(data$median_AF, data$April_23,  method = "spearman")
    corresults_24 <- cor.test(data$median_AF, data$EndMarch_24,  method = "spearman")
    tmp <- c(chr,pos, corresults_22[["p.value"]], corresults_22[["estimate"]], corresults_23[["p.value"]], corresults_23[["estimate"]], corresults_24[["p.value"]], corresults_24[["estimate"]])
    Popsize_model <- rbind(Popsize_model, tmp)
  }
}

Prepare the data for Manhattan plot

Popsize_model <- Popsize_model[-1,] 
Popsize_model <- Popsize_model %>% mutate(across(c(2:8), as.numeric))

III. Randomization x 1000

Model with randomization: 10 times

Popsize_rand_models <- vector("list", 1000)  
for (i in 1:1000) {
  # 1) Randomize type
  pool_map <- median_AF_popsize %>%
    distinct(Sample_ID, April_22, April_23, EndMarch_24) %>%
    mutate(Randomized_April_22 = sample(April_22),
           Randomized_April_23 = sample(April_23),
           Randomized_EndMarch_24 = sample(EndMarch_24))
  data_random <- left_join(median_AF_popsize[,c(1:5)], pool_map[, c(1, 5,6,7)], by = "Sample_ID")
  
  # 2) models for all Chr × Pos
  chrm_list <- c("Chr1", "Chr2", "Chr3", "Chr4", "Chr5")
  Popsize_rand_model <- tibble("Chrm" = "1", "Pos" = 1, pvalue_22 = 1, R_22 = 1, pvalue_23 = 1, R_23 = 1, pvalue_24 = 1, R_24 = 1)
  
  for (chr in chrm_list) {
    data_chr <- data_random %>% filter(Chrm == chr)
    positions <- unique(data_chr$Pos_mean)
    for (pos in positions) {
      data <- data_chr %>% filter(Pos_mean == pos)
      if (nrow(data) == 0) next
      corresults_22 <- cor.test(data$median_AF, data$Randomized_April_22,  method = "spearman")
      corresults_23 <- cor.test(data$median_AF, data$Randomized_April_23,  method = "spearman")
      corresults_24 <- cor.test(data$median_AF, data$Randomized_EndMarch_24,  method = "spearman")
      tmp <- c(chr,pos, corresults_22[["p.value"]], corresults_22[["estimate"]], corresults_23[["p.value"]], corresults_23[["estimate"]], corresults_24[["p.value"]], corresults_24[["estimate"]])
      Popsize_rand_model <- rbind(Popsize_rand_model, tmp)
    }
  }
  
  # 3) Post-processing
  Popsize_rand_model <- Popsize_rand_model[-1, ]
  
  # save result of this i
  Popsize_rand_models[[i]] <- Popsize_rand_model
  print(paste("randomization", i, "done"))
}

Create one data frame

#saveRDS(Popsize_rand_models, "Popsize_rand_models" )
Popsize_rand_model_df <- purrr::map2_df(
  Popsize_rand_models,
  1:1000,
  ~ dplyr::mutate(.x, iter = .y))

Merge the data set

Popsize_model$iter <- "Observed"
Popsize_rand_model_df <- rbind(Popsize_rand_model_df,Popsize_model)
Popsize_rand_model_df <- Popsize_rand_model_df %>% mutate(across(c(2:8), as.numeric)) 
#write_csv(Popsize_rand_model_df, "Popsize_rand_model_df.csv")

IV. Analysis observed vs randomized data

Popsize_rand_model_df <- read_csv("/home/justine/sciebo/Genomic/assays/Randomized_phenotype/Popsize_rand_model_df.csv")
Popsize_rand_model_df <- Popsize_rand_model_df %>% mutate("Data" = if_else(iter != "Observed", "Randomized", "Observed"))

Estimate - April 23

Popsize_rand_model_df %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x=Pos, y=abs(R_23), color = iter, alpha = Data)) + 
  geom_line()  +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Absolute value of R spearman correlation(Alt_frq ~ Popsize_April23) per position with 1000 permutations") +
  facet_wrap(~Chrm , strip.position="bottom", scales = "free_x") +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Observed" = "red"))+ 
  scale_alpha_manual(values = c(1, 0.05))

#ggsave("Absolute value of R spearman correlation Alt_frq Popsize_April23 with 1000 permutations.png", plot =  last_plot(),dpi = 120, bg = "white", scale = 2 )

Quantile distribution - April 23

Quantile_df <- Popsize_rand_model_df %>% filter(iter != "Observed") %>%
  group_by(Chrm, Pos) %>% summarise(Q95 = quantile(R_23, probs = c(.95)),
                                    Q05 = quantile(R_23, probs = c(.05))) 
Quantile_df <-left_join(Popsize_model, Quantile_df, by = c("Chrm", "Pos"))
Quantile_df <- Quantile_df %>% mutate(across(c(2:10), as.numeric))

Quantile_df <- Quantile_df %>% mutate(Estimate_5 = ifelse(R_23>Q95 & pvalue_23 <0.01 | R_23<Q05 & pvalue_23 <0.01 , "TRUE","FALSE"))

Quantile_df <- Quantile_df %>% mutate(Effect = ifelse(Estimate_5 == "TRUE" & R_23 >0, "Positif",
                                                      ifelse(Estimate_5 == "TRUE" & R_23 <0, "Negatif", "Neutral")))

#write_csv(Quantile_df, "Popsize23_position_quantile.csv")

Graphic of the p-value in model and in the 5% distribution of the randomized estimate

Quantile_df  %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x=Pos, y=-log10(pvalue_23), color = Effect, alpha = Effect)) + 
  geom_point(alpha=0.5)  +
  scale_color_manual(values = c( "red", "lightgrey", "#00BFFF")) +
  theme_minimal() +
  facet_wrap(~Chrm , strip.position="bottom", scales = "free_x") +
  ggtitle(paste("Association Popsize_April23 - median AF (+10 SNP per 50kb windows)"))

#ggsave("Association Popsize_April23 - median AF (+10 SNP per 50kb windows)_effect.svg", plot =  last_plot(),dpi = 120, bg = "white", scale = 2 )

Correlation at QTL pic

Quantile_df %>% filter(Estimate_5 ==TRUE) %>% slice_min(pvalue_23, n=10)
popsize23_df <- median_AF_popsize %>% filter(Chrm == "Chr4" & Pos_mean == "14975000" |
                                                  Chrm == "Chr5" & Pos_mean == "23875000")
popsize23_df <- popsize23_df %>% mutate(across(c(2, 4:8), as.numeric)) 

allelic_frq <- as.numeric(unlist(popsize23_df[popsize23_df$Chrm == "Chr4","median_AF"]))
variable <- as.numeric(unlist(popsize23_df[popsize23_df$Chrm == "Chr4","April_23"]))
correlation <- cor.test(allelic_frq,variable ,method = "spearman")
popsize23_df %>% filter(Chrm== "Chr4") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x=median_AF, y=April_23)) +
  geom_point(size=4, color="#EEA9B8") +
  geom_smooth(method=lm , color="darkgrey", se=TRUE) +
  geom_text(x=0.75, y=200, 
            label=paste("pvalue =",round(correlation[["p.value"]], 3),
                        "and R =",round(correlation[["estimate"]],3))) +
  theme_minimal() +
  ggtitle(paste("Popsize April23 ~ allelic frequency Chr4"))

#ggsave("Popsize April23 ~ allelic frequency Chr4.svg", plot =  last_plot(),dpi = 120, bg = "white", scale = 2 )


allelic_frq <- as.numeric(unlist(popsize23_df[popsize23_df$Chrm == "Chr5","median_AF"]))
variable <- as.numeric(unlist(popsize23_df[popsize23_df$Chrm == "Chr5","April_23"]))
correlation <- cor.test(allelic_frq,variable ,method = "spearman")
popsize23_df %>% filter(Chrm== "Chr5") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x=median_AF, y=April_23)) +
  geom_point(size=4, color="#EEA9B8") +
  geom_smooth(method=lm , color="darkgrey", se=TRUE) +
  geom_text(x=0.75, y=200, 
            label=paste("pvalue =",round(correlation[["p.value"]], 3),
                        "and R =",round(correlation[["estimate"]],3))) +
  theme_minimal() +
  ggtitle(paste("Popsize April23 ~ allelic frequency Chr5"))

#ggsave("Popsize April23 ~ allelic frequency Chr5.svg", plot =  last_plot(),dpi = 120, bg = "white", scale = 2 )

April 23 & 24

Quantile_df_24 <- Popsize_rand_model_df %>% filter(iter != "Observed") %>%
  group_by(Chrm, Pos) %>% summarise(Q95 = quantile(R_24, probs = c(.95)),
                                    Q05 = quantile(R_24, probs = c(.05))) 
Quantile_df_24 <-left_join(Popsize_model, Quantile_df_24, by = c("Chrm", "Pos"))
Quantile_df_24 <- Quantile_df_24 %>% mutate(across(c(2:10), as.numeric))

Quantile_df_24 <- Quantile_df_24 %>% mutate(Estimate_5 = ifelse(R_24>Q95 & pvalue_24 <0.01 | R_24<Q05 & pvalue_24 <0.01 , "TRUE","FALSE"))

Quantile_df_24 <- Quantile_df_24 %>% mutate(Effect_24 = ifelse(Estimate_5 == "TRUE" & R_24 >0, "Positif",
                                                      ifelse(Estimate_5 == "TRUE" & R_24 <0, "Negatif", "Neutral")))
Popsize_23.24 <- Quantile_df[,c(1:2,5,6,12)]
Popsize_23.24 <- left_join(Popsize_23.24,Quantile_df_24[,c(1:2,7,8,12)] )
colnames(Popsize_23.24)[5] <- "Effect_23"


tmp1 <- Popsize_23.24 %>% select(Chrm, Pos, contains("pvalue_")) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = -c(Chrm, Pos),
    names_to = "Census_year",
    values_to = "pvalue")
tmp1$Census_year <- gsub("pvalue_", "", tmp1$Census_year)

tmp2 <- Popsize_23.24 %>% select(Chrm, Pos, contains("R")) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = -c(Chrm, Pos),
    names_to = "Census_year",
    values_to = "R")
tmp2$Census_year <- gsub("R_", "", tmp2$Census_year)

tmp3 <- Popsize_23.24 %>% select(Chrm, Pos, contains("Effect_")) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = -c(Chrm, Pos),
    names_to = "Census_year",
    values_to = "Effect")
tmp3$Census_year <- gsub("Effect_", "", tmp2$Census_year)

Popsize_23.24 <- left_join(tmp1, tmp2 , by = c("Chrm", "Pos","Census_year"))
Popsize_23.24 <- left_join(Popsize_23.24, tmp3 , by = c("Chrm", "Pos","Census_year"))

#write_csv(Popsize_22.23, "Popsize23-22_position_quantile.csv")

Graphic p-value & estimate

Popsize_23.24 <- Popsize_23.24 %>% mutate(Effect_color = paste(Census_year, Effect, sep = "_"))
Popsize_23.24 <- Popsize_23.24 %>% mutate(Effect_color = if_else(Effect == "Neutral", "Neutral", Census_year))

color_palette <- c("23" = "#76EE00",
                   "24" = "#00BFFF",
                   "Neutral" = "grey")


Popsize_23.24  %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x=Pos, y=-log10(pvalue), color = Effect_color)) + 
  geom_point(alpha=0.5)  +
  theme_minimal() +
  facet_wrap(~Chrm , strip.position="bottom", scales = "free_x") +
  scale_color_manual(values = color_palette)+
  ggtitle(paste("Association Popsize_April22 & April23 - median AF (+10 SNP per 50kb windows)"))

#ggsave("Association Popsize_April23 & April23 - median AF (+10 SNP per 50kb windows).svg", plot =  last_plot(),dpi = 300, bg = "white", scale = 2 )
